basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, M.Sc./M.tech in Physics or allied disciplines, B.E / B.Tech and M.E / M.Tech with minimum 60% in Computer Science & Engineering, Minimum 60% Marks in MSc Physics, GATE/NET qualified candidates (desirable)
qualification.details: M.E / M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering OR M.Sc./M.tech in Physics or allied disciplines. B.E / B.Tech and M.E / M.Tech with minimum 60% in Computer Science & Engineering. Minimum 60% Marks in MSc Physics. GATE/NET qualified candidates (desirable).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is June 25, 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications required for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E / M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering or M.Sc./M.tech in Physics or allied disciplines. Specific B.E/B.Tech and M.E/M.Tech requirements with a minimum of 60% marks are also detailed.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this BITS Pilani Research Fellow recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: CV shortlisting followed by an online interview for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE/NET qualification mandatory for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, GATE/NET qualification is considered desirable for candidates applying for the Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is a contractual role, offering a fixed-term engagement.

faq.question: Q8. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive by BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the BITS Pilani Research Fellow recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.
